module_handover.change_summary: main.py L180: excel_b_columns.get("jm", "G") changed to excel_b_columns.get("jm", "KJ"). "G" was the numeric employee-ID column (col 7), "KJ" is the Project Manager English name column (col 296).

self_check.python39_syntax: PASS — no match/case, no X|Y union, no walrus abuse
self_check.type_hinting: PASS — no new functions added; existing call unchanged except default value
self_check.error_handling: PASS — dict.get() with default is safe; no new error paths
self_check.path_safety: PASS — no path changes in this MT
self_check.security: PASS — no security-relevant changes; column letter default only
self_check.al_edge_cases: PASS — default "KJ" is valid Excel column letter; will be validated by _col_to_idx() downstream
self_check.docstring: PASS — no new functions; existing docstrings unchanged
